scripts.test:guards: npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:check && npm run guard:object-names && npm run guard:layering && npm run guard:catalog-layering && npm run guard:catalog-runtime-boundary && npm run guard:tool-workspace-ui && npm run guard:catalog-migrations && npm run guard:client-imports && npm run guard:command-planning && npm run guard:vocabulary && npm run guard:turn-effects && npm run guard:serialized-access && npm run guard:smoke-wrangler
scripts.test: npm run test:guards && vitest run --reporter=dot tests/net tests/client/ tests/command-utils.test.ts tests/planning-world.test.ts tests/source-hash.test.ts tests/turn-recorder.test.ts tests/movement-projection.test.ts tests/cf-do-migrations.test.ts tests/clone-plain-data.test.ts tests/smoke-walkthrough-harness.test.ts tests/net-metrics-report.test.ts tests/task-time.test.ts tests/conformance.test.ts tests/persistence.test.ts tests/worker/admin.test.ts tests/worker/net-do.test.ts tests/worker/net-client-api.test.ts tests/worker/net-audit.test.ts tests/worker/span-export.test.ts tests/worker/net-gateway-repair.test.ts tests/worker/net-scope-fanout.test.ts tests/worker/net-session-reap.test.ts tests/worker/net-ws.test.ts tests/worker/net-turn-structure.test.ts tests/worker/net-load-skew.test.ts tests/worker/net-outbox-bounded.test.ts tests/worker/net-wire-contract.test.ts tests/worker/net-install.test.ts tests/worker/net-install-doorway.test.ts tests/worker/net-identity-door.test.ts tests/worker/net-mcp.test.ts
scripts.test:worker: npm run test:guards && vitest run --maxWorkers=2 --reporter=dot tests/worker/net-*.test.ts tests/worker/admin.test.ts tests/worker/internal-headers.test.ts tests/worker/metrics-sink.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:share: playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts -g "pinboard shares created notes with another user|pinboard shared notes survive a peer reload|outliner shares committed items with another user"
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:check && npm run guard:object-names && npm run guard:layering && npm run guard:catalog-layering && npm run guard:catalog-runtime-boundary && npm run guard:tool-workspace-ui && npm run guard:catalog-migrations && npm run guard:client-imports && npm run guard:command-planning && npm run guard:vocabulary && npm run guard:turn-effects && npm run guard:serialized-access && npm run guard:smoke-wrangler
scripts.build:net-only: WOO_NET_ONLY_BUILD=1 npm run build && node scripts/check-net-only-build.mjs && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.net-only.toml
